cardenergy:Recovery.NAME: Recovery
cardenergy:Recovery.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. Return up to 2 exhausted cards to your discard pile.

cardenergy:RottingShelter.NAME: Rotting Shelter
cardenergy:RottingShelter.DESCRIPTION: cardenergy:Rot. NL Gain !B! Block. Draw !M! card.

cardenergy:Stockpile.NAME: Stockpile
cardenergy:Stockpile.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. Deal !D! damage. NL NL cardenergy:Hoard 3.

cardenergy:ScrapSpray.NAME: Scrap Spray
cardenergy:ScrapSpray.DESCRIPTION: cardenergy:Consume. NL Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.
